query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_resolutions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  meetingId INT,
  resolutionNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  resolutionType ENUM('operational', 'financial', 'governance', 'personnel', 'strategic', 'emergency') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'proposed', 'voting', 'passed', 'failed', 'tabled', 'withdrawn') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  votesFor INT DEFAULT 0,
  votesAgainst INT DEFAULT 0,
  votesAbstain INT DEFAULT 0,
  votingDeadline TIMESTAMP,
  passedDate TIMESTAMP,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP,
  proposedBy INT,
  secondedBy INT,
  votes JSON,
  attachments JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS board_resolutions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  entityId INT NOT NULL,
  meetingId INT,
  resolutionNumber VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT NOT NULL,
  resolutionType ENUM('operational', 'financial', 'governance', 'personnel', 'strategic', 'emergency') NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'proposed', 'voting', 'passed', 'failed', 'tabled', 'withdrawn') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  votesFor INT DEFAULT 0,
  votesAgainst INT DEFAULT 0,
  votesAbstain INT DEFAULT 0,
  votingDeadline TIMESTAMP,
  passedDate TIMESTAMP,
  effectiveDate TIMESTAMP,
  proposedBy INT,
  secondedBy INT,
  votes JSON,
  attachments JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
